place: VELA Viento, Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa District, Dubai, UAE
title: VELA Viento — Dorchester Collection Residence
blurb: A three-bedroom residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection — rising 180 m above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District, with Foster + Partners architecture, Gilles & Boissier interiors and Dorchester Collection service.
detail:
VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, Dubai ascends to celestial heights above Marasi Bay in the Burj Khalifa District, where land and water converge into a lifestyle without compare. Crafted by OMNIYAT, it merges the architectural mastery of Foster + Partners, the refined interiors of Gilles & Boissier, and the timeless hospitality of Dorchester Collection — rising from the canal to a soaring 180 metres.

The fully furnished residences are designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living with generous proportions, framing panoramic views of Marasi Bay, Burj Khalifa and Downtown Dubai. Every amenity — from skyline pools and private lounges to dedicated fitness suites and spa sanctuaries — has been shaped by comfort and considered luxury.

This three-bedroom residence is crafted for those who value expansive living and elevated design. Flowing layouts and generous proportions give a sense of volume and grace; floor-to-ceiling windows invite natural light to move through the space, while multiple terraces provide open-air moments framed by striking views of Marasi Bay. Each bedroom is a private haven, thoughtfully positioned for comfort and seclusion, while the living areas are designed to gather, entertain and inspire.
